description: Email mentions 'priority SMS when the round opens' — should fail FMTH-PRIORITY-001. The compound 'priority SMS' is one of the explicit retired phrasings called out in CSF-VIP-BIRCHAL-SUBMISSION.md §9.
text:
Hi friend,

The FarmThru CSF round opens 23 June 2026 on Birchal. As a VIP, you've already secured your spot.

We'll send you a priority SMS the moment the round opens, plus founder updates as we get closer.

Nothing changes about the investment terms — every investor applies through Birchal on the standard terms when the round opens. Your $5 is fully refundable.

Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.

Rachel & the FarmThru team
